description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted range hood with a sleek, rectangular design and a glossy black finish. The main body consists of a wide, flat base that extends outward, supporting a tall, vertical chimney section. The front face features a subtle control panel with small, illuminated indicators, likely for power and fan speed adjustment. Ventilation slits are visible on the upper sides of the chimney, suggesting efficient air extraction. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with possible glass or plastic elements for the control interface. The minimalist aesthetic and clean lines make it suitable for contemporary urban kitchens.
description: A sleek, glossy black wall-mounted range hood with a wide base, tall chimney, and illuminated front control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide base, tall vertical chimney, and the central control panel with illuminated indicators.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the base and the vertical extension of the chimney, with visible vent slits near the top.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the flat back and the full width of the base, with the control panel faintly visible at the bottom edge.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the depth and vent slits on the chimney's upper section.
attribute_control_panel_type: touch panel located on the front lower edge of the base, with small illuminated icons for controls.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are placed on the upper sides of the chimney section, oriented horizontally.
